name: shayan-ahmed-portfolio
description: Cyber-Classical portfolio platform for Shayan Ahmed

scripts.start: npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node prisma/seed.js && node src/server.js
scripts.dev: npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node prisma/seed.js && node --watch src/server.js
scripts.setup: npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.vercel-build: npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js
